---
title: "Contact"
---

Whether it's about data, food experiments, or anything in between — I'm always happy to connect.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
**📧 Email**

[tanishq.katheriya2@mail.dcu.ie](mailto:tanishq.katheriya2@mail.dcu.ie)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
**💼 LinkedIn**

[linkedin.com/in/tk23](https://www.linkedin.com/in/tk23){target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
**💻 GitHub**

[github.com/Tanishq-katheriya](https://github.com/Tanishq-katheriya){target="_blank"}
:::

:::

## Professional References

Available on request. Please reach out via email.
